hub.title: Full-stack digital delivery

hub.ctaSubtitle: 30 minutes — and you'll have a sense of scope, timeline and price.

page.title: Websites that sell and don't fall apart
page.subtitle: From a landing in two weeks to e-commerce on Next.js Commerce. Custom brand design, Lighthouse 95+, SEO-ready from day one.

f1.title: Lighthouse 95+
f1.desc: Instant load, perfect Core Web Vitals — even on 4G

f2.title: Custom brand design
f2.desc: No Tilda templates — every page drawn for the product

f3.title: Headless CMS
f3.desc: Marketing runs content without touching code

f4.title: Post-launch support
f4.desc: A free month of iterations after launch — to polish on live data

q1.a: Landing — 2–3 weeks, corporate site — 4–6 weeks, e-commerce — 8–12 weeks.

q2.a: From $3k for a landing, from $15k for a corporate site, from $30k for e-commerce.

q3.a: Vercel, Netlify or your VPS — your call. We can move to any infrastructure.

q4.a: Figma before development. Minimum 2 iterations included.

page.title: CRM you actually want to work in
page.subtitle: Custom systems instead of «fields inside Bitrix24». Tailored to your process, with integrations, without the usual zoo of tabs.

f1.title: Tailored to your process
f1.desc: We learn how managers really work — then we design

f2.title: Integrations
f2.desc: 1C, Bitrix24, amoCRM, telephony, e-mail, inventory systems

f3.title: Analytics
f3.desc: Owner dashboards, BI exports, pipeline forecasts

f4.title: Roles & permissions
f4.desc: Granular access, action audit, safe API

q1.a: 1–2-week discovery: team interviews, process map, spec.

q2.q: What if we already have amoCRM?
q2.a: We can build modules on top or migrate to a custom system.

q3.a: Cloud (AWS / Selectel / Yandex Cloud) or on-prem — your call.

q4.a: From $18k for an MVP up to $100k+ for a mature system with integrations.

page.title: Telegram as a sales and product channel
page.subtitle: Mini Apps with Telegram Stars payments, booking bots, automated routines. All synced with CRM and analytics.

f1.title: Telegram Mini Apps
f1.desc: Full product inside Telegram — no AppStore or Google Play

f3.title: CRM integration
f3.desc: Leads and orders land in your CRM — no copy-pasting

f4.title: Analytics
f4.desc: Funnel, retention, anomalies — on our metrics stack

q1.q: How long for a Mini App?
q1.a: Simple bot — 1 week, Mini App with payments — 3–5 weeks.

q3.a: Usually Aiogram + FastAPI; for Mini Apps — Next.js + Telegram Web Apps SDK.

q4.q: Can we plug in our client base?
q4.a: Yes — via API or direct DB connection.

page.title: iOS and Android — without 4 teams and 8 months
page.subtitle: React Native for speed and a single codebase. Native — when you need the max: AR, graphics, background work.

f1.title: One team
f1.desc: React Native + Expo: one codebase, two stores

f3.title: Subscriptions & payments
f3.desc: RevenueCat, StoreKit2, Google Play Billing v6

f4.title: Store releases
f4.desc: Metadata, screenshots, policies, review — we handle it

q1.a: 80% of cases — RN. Native — when you need 3D, AR or background work.

q3.a: From $22k for an MVP up to $60k+ for a mature app with subscriptions.

q4.a: We support, fix crashes, update SDKs, ship releases.

page.title: Organic traffic, not empty rankings
page.subtitle: Technical SEO, content strategy, analytics, experiments. We measure by revenue, not by keywords in top.

f1.title: Technical SEO
f1.desc: Core Web Vitals, indexing, schema.org, sitemap, canonicals

f2.title: Content strategy
f2.desc: From search intents to editorial guidelines

f3.title: Analytics
f3.desc: GA4, Yandex.Metrika, Looker Studio, goal & attribution setup

f4.title: A/B & experiments
f4.desc: PostHog, GrowthBook — learn from data, not from gut

q1.a: Technical wins in 1–2 months, content growth in 4–6 months.

q2.a: From $1.5k/month for audit + support, from $3k/month for full product SEO.

q3.a: We can run them if needed — but it's not our main thing.

q4.a: Our editorial team — or curated for the niche.

hero.title: The team that
hero.subtitle: We build websites, CRMs, bots and apps — but we measure ourselves by client revenue after release, not by lines of code.

v1.title: Product > tasks
v1.desc: We push back if a solution is worse for the user. Sometimes awkward, always honest.

v2.title: Ship, not «almost done»
v2.desc: We release in small iterations. «90% done» isn't a release.

v3.title: Data, not «I think»
v3.desc: Metrics and experiments — not taste — especially after launch.

v4.title: Support like a parent
v4.desc: We don't drop projects after shipping. We fix crashes and help them grow.

m1.name: Khaphol Afzal
m1.bio: 8 years in digital, from frontend to launching the agency. Owns strategy and client relations.

m2.name: Anna Kaplan
m2.bio: Design systems, brand, UX flows. On principle: no Tilda templates.

m3.name: Mikhail Voronin
m3.bio: Next.js, NestJS, infra and architecture. Code-reviews every release.

m4.name: Olga Sokolova
m4.bio: Missed deadlines are her personal grief. That's why we don't have them.
